signals.npcLine: Markets bleed; trust fades into neon shadows.
signals.questPulse: Hunt the faltering digital asset before it vanishes.
signals.worldFeed: Crypto tides ebbing; echoes of lost credits in the net.
signals.clueEvent: Unstable tokens spook the traders on the grid.

signals.npcLine: Chip spikes caught the net’s eye; watch the surge.
signals.questPulse: Intercept signal on rising node CHIP; decode the intent.
signals.worldFeed: Anomalous uptick on CHIP subsystem, alert operations.
signals.clueEvent: Unexpected activity detected at CHIP circuitry node.

signals.npcLine: Pengu moves swiftly; a frozen asset melts in the dark.
signals.questPulse: Track the PENGU phantom before it fades from sight.
signals.worldFeed: Whispers of PENGU’s momentum ripple through the market mesh.
signals.clueEvent: PENGU token flickers; anomaly in cold data streams.

signals.npcLine: Asteroid drifts wide; scatter nets to contain the threat.
signals.questPulse: Secure the ASTEROID transmission before hostile capture.
signals.worldFeed: ASTEROID data cluster detected off-chart; scan and recover.
signals.clueEvent: System flags outlier signals near ASTEROID network node.

signals.npcLine: SPK quiet for now, but silence breeds suspicion.
signals.questPulse: Spy the SPK enclave; anticipate the next move.
signals.worldFeed: SPK stable but watched; net eyes narrow, waiting.
signals.clueEvent: SPK shows no trigger spikes; under surveillance.
